results.evidence: github-feature-sync.ts:1079 fetches issueData once, passes to updateStatusLabels at line 1142
updateStatusLabels() accepts cachedIssueData param (line 1165), uses it when provided (line 1170)
Second getIssue() at old line 1228 removed; reuses issueData from line 1170. freshState uses cached data (line 1257)
lastComment fetched once at line 1083, passed to postProgressCommentIfChanged (line 1137) and updateStatusLabels (line 1142)
syncFeatureToGitHub() calls checkRateLimit() at line 138, before lock acquisition at line 162
When remaining < 200, returns early with rateLimitSkipped: true and warning log (lines 139-151)
Return value includes rateLimitSkipped flag; callers can queue for retry via existing retry infrastructure
updateStatusLabels() already had needsUpdate check at line 1212 that skips when labels match (pre-existing)
postProgressCommentIfChanged() now accepts cachedLastComment (line 1314), uses client.getLastComment as fallback (line 1324)
Body check skips edit (line 1052-1054), label check skips when matching (line 1214), comment check skips when unchanged (line 1343)
duplicate-detector.ts: Phase 3 condition changed to !wasReused && ... (line ~489), skips when reusing existing
When wasReused=false (new issue created), Phase 3 verification still runs as before
